---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for DevStrap
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / use case

A clear description of the problem or workflow you are trying to support. What
are you trying to do, and what gets in the way today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to happen. If it touches the sync model, hub, worktrees, or
secrets, note which area.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about, and why they fall short.

## Additional context

Links to relevant design specs (see [`spec/`](../../spec)), audit items
(`docs/audits/AUDIT_RECOMMENDATIONS_*.md`), screenshots, or examples.
